fonts.install_instructions: Use fontsource or google fonts for IBM Plex Mono. For Cabinet Grotesk and Satoshi, use Fontshare API via standard link tag in index.html: <link href="https://api.fontshare.com/v2/css?f[]=cabinet-grotesk@800,500,700,400&f[]=satoshi@900,700,500,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

rules: Headings strictly use Cabinet Grotesk with tight letter spacing.
SKUs, prices, margins, and numeric data must use IBM Plex Mono with right-alignment.
Strict Swiss color logic: Color is function. 95% of the dashboard should be monochrome (black, white, greys).
Reserve International Klein Blue (#002FA7) strictly for primary actions and active navigation states.
Traffic-Light status: Use Emerald Green for 'En stock', Signal Red for 'Rupture' (Out of stock).

layouts.dashboard_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-4 or gap-6

navigation.type: Left Sidebar (Dark Mode #09090B) + Top App Bar (Light Mode #FFFFFF)
navigation.top_bar: Sticky top bar with Command Palette (Cmd+K) search, stock alerts bell, and JWT profile.

panels.style: Sharp edges (rounded-none or rounded-sm max 4px). 1px solid border (border-slate-200). NO drop shadows. Flat, geometric, technical aesthetic.

icons.style: weight="duotone" for sidebar, weight="regular" for dense tables.

tables.style: Grid Borders style. border-collapse. border-b border-r border-slate-200 on cells. Sticky headers for catalog.
tables.data_alignment: Right-align all numbers (Prices, Margins, Stock levels) to stack decimal points.

wizards.usage: Supplier catalog import (CSV/JSON/XML). Use step-by-step progressive disclosure. Don't overwhelm users.
wizards.mapping_ui: Use two-column mapping interface with visual connecting lines or clear select dropdowns for column matching.

command_palette.usage: Implement a global Cmd+K search (using cmdk) for quick access to products, orders, or suppliers.

overrides: Remove all generic soft drop shadows from Shadcn cards. Replace with 1px border-slate-200.

rules: Calm Design: Minimal animations. Instant feedback for B2B efficiency.
Hover states: Background changes to slate-50, text remains high contrast.
Use sonner for French toast notifications (e.g., 'Synchronisation réussie', 'Rupture de stock détectée').

warehouse_hero.description: European warehouse overview, to be used in 'Fournisseurs' (Suppliers) onboarding or empty states.

product_decor_1.description: High-end hand lotion, minimalist. Use as a catalog product mockup.

product_decor_2.description: Candle jar, minimalist. Use as a catalog product mockup.

product_decor_3.description: White ceramic vase. Use as a catalog product mockup.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a French application. All UI text MUST be in French.
Do NOT use typical SaaS aesthetic (soft shadows, highly rounded corners). Emulate high-end European enterprise software (Swiss grid, technical borders, mono fonts for data).

For the 'Tableau de bord' (Dashboard), prioritize F-pattern scannability. Top row: 4 key metrics (Chiffre d'affaires, Commandes en attente, Alertes de stock, Marge moyenne). Left column: Top products. Right column: Recent activity.
For 'Catalogue', use a dense data table. Include columns for: Produit, Fournisseur (multi-select mapping badge), Coût, Prix de vente (calculated via rules), Stock, Actions.
Use Recharts for the Analytics section. Keep charts monochrome or dual-tone (Primary Blue and Accent Red).
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='import-csv-button', data-testid='sync-woo-button').
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy, or in this specific case, precise 1px borders and grid alignments.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style. (For this app: sharp buttons).
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons. Use Phosphor Icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Use `sonner` for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
